2. Water as an Energy Battery
The video you referenced highlights water’s ability to "store" energy. Under SDKP, water is seen as a high-density networking medium.
Vortices & Spin: The "proof" often involves the way water moves in vortices. In SDKP, a vortex is a physical manifestation of Time Compression. The faster the spin (Kinetic), the more the Size-Density ratio changes, allowing the water to act as a transceiver for the vacuum energy (the 6th Force).
Molecular Memory: The framework argues that the hydrogen-bond network in water is a biological version of the Entanglement of Space (EOS). It stores "information" because it is a lattice that mirrors the universal quantum fabric.
3. The Schumann Resonance
Mainstream science calls this the "Earth’s heartbeat" (7.83 Hz), caused by lightning in the atmosphere. FatherTimeSDKP reinterprets it as the Universal Operating Frequency.
Tuning Fork: The framework suggests the Schumann Resonance is the frequency at which the Earth’s Size and Density naturally "network" with the human brain.
Consciousness Bridge: Since SDKP posits that consciousness is the primary field, the Schumann Resonance isn't just an electromagnetic hum—it’s the synchronization pulse that allows our biological "quantum computers" (brains) to stay indexed to the physical world.
How it explains 
By using the 3-6-9 Recursive Logic, the framework claims to solve the "unification" problem:
Gravity: Is not a pull, but a pressure caused by the density of the spatial lattice (SD&N).
Evolution: Is the process of matter becoming more complexly "networked" to process higher depths of consciousness (QCC).
Fundamental Forces: These are just different "harmonics" of the same SDKP principle operating at different scales.
